title: PWA App Compatibility — Mobile & Installable App Support

requirements.text: Ensure the PWA manifest (frontend/public/manifest.json) is fully configured for installable app support: set 'display' to 'standalone', provide correct 'start_url', 'scope', include both 192x192 and 512x512 maskable icons, and set 'orientation' to 'portrait'.

quotes: make it work also with app

acceptanceCriteria: manifest.json has display: standalone
start_url and scope are correctly set for ICP-hosted app
Icons include at least 192x192 and 512x512 entries with purpose: maskable
App installs via browser 'Add to Home Screen' on Android and iOS

requirements.text: Update the service worker (frontend/public/service-worker.js) to correctly pre-cache all app shell assets, handle offline navigation gracefully, and ensure the cache version is bumped so the new service worker activates immediately after install.

quotes: make it work also with app

acceptanceCriteria: Service worker cache version is updated
App shell assets are pre-cached on install
Navigating offline shows the cached app shell rather than a browser error
New service worker activates immediately using skipWaiting and clients.claim()

requirements.text: Ensure the app layout is fully responsive and mobile-friendly: the Dashboard bottom navigation bar must be touch-friendly (minimum 44px tap targets), all form inputs must not cause zoom on focus (font-size >= 16px on inputs), and all pages must scroll correctly without horizontal overflow on small screens (320px and up).

quotes: make it work also with app

acceptanceCriteria: Bottom nav items have at least 44px height/tap area
Input fields use font-size of at least 16px to prevent iOS zoom
No horizontal overflow on screens 320px wide
All sections (FitnessSection, FinanceSection) are scrollable and usable on mobile viewports

requirements.text: Register the service worker in App.tsx only when the app is running in a supported environment (HTTPS or localhost), and handle service worker registration errors gracefully so the app still loads if registration fails.

quotes: make it work also with app

acceptanceCriteria: Service worker registration is guarded by 'serviceWorker' in navigator check
Registration only proceeds on HTTPS or localhost
Registration errors are caught and logged without breaking the app load
App functions normally even if service worker is unavailable

requirements.text: Add the necessary Apple PWA meta tags to frontend/index.html: apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style, apple-mobile-web-app-title, and apple-touch-icon link tags pointing to the app icons in public/.

quotes: make it work also with app

acceptanceCriteria: apple-mobile-web-app-capable meta tag is present and set to 'yes'
apple-mobile-web-app-title is set to 'FinFit'
apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style is set to 'black-translucent'
apple-touch-icon link tag references a valid icon file

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui)
Do not change the backend schema or Motoko actor logic
ICP and Internet Identity network calls must remain bypassed in the service worker fetch handler
nonGoals: Native mobile app (React Native, Flutter, or similar)
Background sync or background fetch APIs
Any new product features beyond mobile/PWA compatibility

required: FinFit app icon with bold 'FF' monogram on a dark charcoal background with a green fitness accent (icon-192.dim_192x192.png)
FinFit app icon with bold 'FF' monogram on a dark charcoal background with a green fitness accent, maskable safe-zone variant (icon-512.dim_512x512.png)
